mapper.select: SELECT i.name, i.type, p.flow, p.head_count, i.item_status, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at,,process_status FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num WHERE i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY i.item_num DESC

SELECT b.bom_code, i.name, i.item_status, i.code, b.required_qty, b.bom_status, TO_CHAR(b.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, b.bom_num FROM bom b JOIN item i ON b.item_num = i.item_num
where 1 = 1
AND upper(i.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(i.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND ( upper(i.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(b.bom_code) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
AND upper(b.bom_status) = 'Y'
AND upper(b.bom_status) = 'N'
AND b.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND b.created_at < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND b.created_at < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY b.bom_num DESC

SELECT i.CODE, i.NAME, i.TYPE, i.UNIT, i.iTEM_NUM FROM item i LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM ITEM MINUS SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM BOM ) num ON i.item_num = num.item_num WHERE( UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.CODE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%') AND num.ITEM_NUM IS NOT NULL AND i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT')

SELECT i.item_num, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.STATUS, p.process_status, p.flow, p.image, p.process_content, p.process_num, p.head_count FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num where i.item_num = #{itemNum}
